hero.name: Mohamed Dahy
hero.title: Front-End Developer | Software Engineer
hero.intro: Seasoned Software Engineer experienced in developing applications, databases, and cloud computing solutions. Smart professional with proven troubleshooting and debugging capabilities.

about.heading: About Me
about.journey: My career began in Agricultural Technology Management before transitioning into Computer Science and modern software engineering. This shift built a unique mindset that combines operational precision with technical creativity.
about.focus: I focus on scalable, maintainable, and reusable code that helps products evolve confidently over time.
strengths: Integrating new technologies into live systems

skills.heading: Skills
skills.subheading: A balanced stack for product delivery from interface craftsmanship to robust backend logic.

points: Tested methodology with writing and execution of test plans, debugging scripts, and testing tools.
Supervised programmers, designers, and technicians while assigning tasks and monitoring targets.
Rapidly prototyped data processing capabilities to validate integration feasibility.
Communicated project milestones to internal personnel and external stakeholders.
Developed scalable and maintainable code that improved long-term product stability.
Implemented debugging strategies that reduced defects and improved reliability.
Built reusable components that reduced implementation effort across projects.
Integrated new technologies into existing systems to unlock additional capabilities.
Developed scalable and maintainable front-end architecture.
Integrated modern technologies into existing systems for better performance.
Created reusable components that accelerated product delivery.
Applied practical debugging processes that improved release quality.
